name: Orange Lemon Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Add orange and lemon rinds to butter and cream well.
2. Gradually add egg whites, salt, and blemns (batter).
3. Mix in sugar, alternating with the fruit juices, until smooth and of a spreading consistency.
4. Add orange food coloring.
Makes frosting for one 8x8 inch layer cake and sides of two 8-inch round layers.
